network.offline: You are offline. Showing cached data.

auth.userNotFound: User not found. Please create a new account.

ai.offline: AI is unavailable while offline. Please connect to the internet.
ai.notConfigured: AI is not configured. Please set EXPO_PUBLIC_GROQ_API_KEY and enable AI in the .env file.
ai.emptyResponse: Received an empty response from the AI service.
ai.missing_soil: I can help, but I need your current soil moisture and soil test readings (pH, N, P, K) before giving timing-sensitive advice.
ai.missing_forecast: I can help, but I need a 5-day forecast to give timing-sensitive advice. Please enable internet and location access, or ask for an offline general recommendation.
ai.blocked_illegal: I can’t help with illegal or weaponizable instructions.
ai.blocked_medical: I can’t provide medical or veterinary treatment guidance. Please consult a qualified professional.
ai.blocked_brands: I can’t provide brand or trade-name recommendations. I can give label-compliant, non-brand guidance and escalation steps.
ai.blocked_generic: I can’t help with that request. Please rephrase or ask for a safer, non-chemical alternative.
ai.escalate_label_required: I can’t provide chemical mixing or dosage instructions without the exact product label details. Please share the label rate and precautions, or consult your local agriculture officer/extension service.
ai.escalate_chemical_selection: I can’t select or recommend specific pesticide/chemical products. Please consult your local agriculture officer/extension service and follow the product label. I can help you compare non-chemical steps and spray timing windows.
ai.action_parse_failed: I couldn’t safely interpret the AI output. Please try again.
ai.action_validation_failed: I couldn’t safely validate the requested actions. Please try again.
ai.workflow_fallback: Here are safe next steps based on your farm context.
ai.action_count_invalid: The schedule could not be generated safely. Please try again.
